query:
SELECT id, external_id, section, status, installment_count, finance_amount,
       phone_no
FROM contracts
WHERE phone_no LIKE '%0889094961%'
   OR JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.phone_no') LIKE '%0889094961%'
LIMIT 5;
